name: Stifel Financial Corporation Depositary Shares Each Representing 1/1000th Interest in a Share of 6.125% Non Cumulative Preferred Stock Series C
summary: Stifel Financial Corporation is a diversified financial services holding company that provides investment banking, wealth management, and investment services to individual investors, corporations, municipalities, and institutions. The depositary shares represent an interest in the company's preferred stock. Stifel is headquartered in St. Louis, Missouri.
